attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   RANK() OVER (ORDER BY STG.AUDIT_REASON_ID) + MAX_VAL  EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT_KEY,
   STG.AUDIT_REASON_ID AS SK_AUDIT_REASON_ID_INT,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   USER EDW_CREATE_USER   
FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_CFN_AP_AUD_AUDIT_REASONS STG
LEFT  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
ON CAST(STG.CREATED_BY as varchar(150))=NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NEP
ON  STG.REPORT_HEADER_ID= NEP.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT ,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT) SMERA
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT SMERA WHERE SMERA.SK_AUDIT_REASON_ID_INT = STG.AUDIT_REASON_ID)

select 
SMERA.EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT_KEY,
SRC.AUDIT_REASON_ID as SK_AUDIT_REASON_ID_INT,
NEP.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,
SRC.AUDIT_REASON_CODE as AUDIT_REASON_CD,
CAST(SRC.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
SRC.CREATION_DATE AS DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,    
coalesce( NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999 )SRC_CRTD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,                
CAST(SRC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
SRC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE as DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SRC.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT                    
STG.AUDIT_REASON_ID  ,             
STG.REPORT_HEADER_ID  ,            
STG.AUDIT_REASON_CODE        ,    
STG.CREATION_DATE            ,    
STG.CREATED_BY               ,    
STG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN        ,    
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE         ,    
STG.LAST_UPDATED_BY          ,    
STG.GLOBAL_NAME              ,    
STG.GES_UPDATE_DATE         ,
STG.ACTION_CODE 
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CFN_AP_AUD_AUDIT_REASONS STG
UNION
SELECT 
EX_CAAR.AUDIT_REASON_ID       ,        
EX_CAAR.REPORT_HEADER_ID      ,        
EX_CAAR.AUDIT_REASON_CODE     ,        
EX_CAAR.CREATION_DATE         ,        
EX_CAAR.CREATED_BY            ,        
EX_CAAR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN     ,        
EX_CAAR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE      ,        
EX_CAAR.LAST_UPDATED_BY       ,        
EX_CAAR.GLOBAL_NAME           ,        
EX_CAAR.GES_UPDATE_DATE   ,
EX_CAAR.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CFN_AP_AUD_AUDIT_REASONS EX_CAAR)SRC
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT SMERA
ON SRC.AUDIT_REASON_ID=SMERA.SK_AUDIT_REASON_ID_INT
LEFT  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
ON CAST(SRC.CREATED_BY AS VARCHAR(150))=NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT NEP
ON  SRC.REPORT_HEADER_ID= NEP.SK_REPORT_HEADER_ID_INT

SELECT 
STG.BATCH_ID           ,          
STG.AUDIT_REASON_ID    ,          
STG.REPORT_HEADER_ID   ,          
STG.AUDIT_REASON_CODE  ,          
STG.CREATION_DATE      ,          
STG.CREATED_BY         ,          
STG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN  ,          
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE   ,          
STG.LAST_UPDATED_BY    ,          
STG.GLOBAL_NAME        ,          
STG.GES_UPDATE_DATE    ,          
STG.ACTION_CODE        ,          
STG.CREATE_DATETIME,
STG.EXCEPTION_TYPE    
FROM
(
SELECT
BATCH_ID               ,  
AUDIT_REASON_ID        ,  
REPORT_HEADER_ID       ,  
AUDIT_REASON_CODE      ,  
CREATION_DATE          ,  
CREATED_BY             ,  
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN      ,  
LAST_UPDATE_DATE       ,  
LAST_UPDATED_BY        ,  
GLOBAL_NAME            ,  
GES_UPDATE_DATE        ,  
ACTION_CODE            ,  
CREATE_DATETIME        ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE      
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CFN_AP_AUD_AUDIT_REASONS) STG
WHERE
NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_EXPENSE_REPORT_AUDIT WRK
WHERE WRK.SK_AUDIT_REASON_ID_INT =STG.AUDIT_REASON_ID)
